languages.text: "Помимо основного исследования Эксплораторов, мы с Оксильдой провели дополнительное изыскание. В ходе него ко мне явилось откровение Омниссии, и я частично постиг криптографический принцип сигнала, что управляет Погонщицами. Думаю, мы можем использовать определенные частоты, транслируемые вокс-рупорами, чтобы ударить по тварям их же оружием, установив его на транспортные средства мобильных групп".

traits.locale_text: "Помимо основного исследования Эксплораторов, мы с Оксильдой провели дополнительное изыскание. В ходе него ко мне явилось откровение Омниссии, и я частично постиг криптографический принцип сигнала, что управляет Погонщицами. Думаю, мы можем использовать определенные частоты, транслируемые вокс-рупорами, чтобы ударить по тварям их же оружием, установив его на транспортные средства мобильных групп".

languages.text: "Beyond the primary Explorator investigation, Oksilda and I conducted an additional study. During this, the Omnissiah granted me a revelation and I partially identified the cryptographic principles of the signal that governs the Drovers. I believe we can employ specific frequencies, broadcast through vox-hailers mounted upon vehicles of the mobile teams, to turn the creatures' own weaponry against them."
languages.original_text: "Помимо основного исследования Эксплораторов, мы с Оксильдой провели дополнительное изыскание. В ходе него ко мне явилось откровение Омниссии, и я частично постиг криптографический принцип сигнала, что управляет Погонщицами. Думаю, мы можем использовать определенные частоты, транслируемые вокс-рупорами, чтобы ударить по тварям их же оружием, установив его на транспортные средства мобильных групп".

traits.locale_text: "Beyond the primary Explorator investigation, Oksilda and I conducted an additional study. During this, the Omnissiah granted me a revelation, and I partially comprehended the cryptographic principle of the signal that governs the Drovers. I believe we can employ specific frequencies, broadcast through vox-hailers mounted upon mobile group vehicles, to turn the creatures' own weaponry against them."

"Beyond the primary Explorator investigation, Oksilda and I conducted an additional study. During this, the Omnissiah granted me a revelation, and I partially comprehended the cryptographic principle of the signal that governs the Drovers. I believe we can employ specific frequencies, broadcast through vox-hailers mounted upon mobile group vehicles, to turn the creatures' own weaponry against them."

During this, the Omnissiah granted me a revelation and I partially identified the cryptographic principles of the signal that governs the Drovers. I believe we can employ specific frequencies, broadcast through vox-hailers mounted upon vehicles of the mobile teams, to turn the creatures' own weaponry against them."

"Beyond the primary Explorator investigation, Oksilda and I conducted an additional study. During this, the Omnissiah granted me a revelation and I partially identified the cryptographic principles of the signal that governs the Drovers. I believe we can employ specific frequencies, broadcast through vox-hailers mounted upon vehicles of the mobile teams, to turn the creatures' own weaponry against them."

languages.text: "Neben der primären Untersuchung der Exploratoren haben Oksilda und ich an einer weiteren Studie gearbeitet. In deren Verlauf gewährte mir der Omnissiah eine Offenbarung, und ich konnte die kryptografischen Prinzipien des Signals, das die Treiber steuert, teilweise identifizieren. Ich glaube, wir können spezifische Frequenzen über auf den Fahrzeugen der mobilen Teams montierte Voxlautsprecher übertragen, um die Kreaturen mit ihren eigenen Waffen zu schlagen."
languages.original_text: "Beyond the primary Explorator investigation, Oksilda and I conducted an additional study. During this, the Omnissiah granted me a revelation and I partially identified the cryptographic principles of the signal that governs the Drovers. I believe we can employ specific frequencies, broadcast through vox-hailers mounted upon vehicles of the mobile teams, to turn the creatures' own weaponry against them."

traits.locale_text: "Neben der primären Untersuchung der Exploratoren haben Oksilda und ich an einer weiteren Studie gearbeitet. In deren Verlauf gewährte mir der Omnissiah eine Offenbarung, und ich konnte die kryptografischen Prinzipien des Signals, das die Treiber steuert, teilweise identifizieren. Ich glaube, wir können spezifische Frequenzen über auf den Fahrzeugen der mobilen Teams montierte Voxlautsprecher übertragen, um die Kreaturen mit ihren eigenen Waffen zu schlagen."

languages.text: « En plus de l'enquête principale des explorators, Oksilda et moi avons mené une analyse supplémentaire, au cours de laquelle j'ai eu une révélation de l'Omnimessie. J'ai ainsi pu décoder partiellement les principes cryptographiques du signal auquel obéissent les Chasseurs. Je pense qu'en émettant des fréquences précises, à l'aide d'escouades mobiles sur des véhicules avec voxophones embarqués, nous serions en mesure de retourner leurs propres armes contre eux. »
languages.original_text: "Beyond the primary Explorator investigation, Oksilda and I conducted an additional study. During this, the Omnissiah granted me a revelation and I partially identified the cryptographic principles of the signal that governs the Drovers. I believe we can employ specific frequencies, broadcast through vox-hailers mounted upon vehicles of the mobile teams, to turn the creatures' own weaponry against them."

traits.locale_text: « En plus de l'enquête principale des explorators, Oksilda et moi avons mené une analyse supplémentaire, au cours de laquelle j'ai eu une révélation de l'Omnimessie. J'ai ainsi pu décoder partiellement les principes cryptographiques du signal auquel obéissent les Chasseurs. Je pense qu'en émettant des fréquences précises, à l'aide d'escouades mobiles sur des véhicules avec voxophones embarqués, nous serions en mesure de retourner leurs propres armes contre eux. »

languages.text: «Además de la investigación principal de los exploradores, Oksilda y yo realizamos un estudio adicional. En su transcurso, el Omnissiah me otorgó una revelación que me permitió identificar parcialmente los principios criptográficos de la señal que gobierna a los Pastores. Creo que podemos emplear frecuencias específicas mediante vocomegáfonos montados en vehículos de equipos móviles para volver las armas del enemigo en su contra».
languages.original_text: "Beyond the primary Explorator investigation, Oksilda and I conducted an additional study. During this, the Omnissiah granted me a revelation and I partially identified the cryptographic principles of the signal that governs the Drovers. I believe we can employ specific frequencies, broadcast through vox-hailers mounted upon vehicles of the mobile teams, to turn the creatures' own weaponry against them."

traits.locale_text: «Además de la investigación principal de los exploradores, Oksilda y yo realizamos un estudio adicional. En su transcurso, el Omnissiah me otorgó una revelación que me permitió identificar parcialmente los principios criptográficos de la señal que gobierna a los Pastores. Creo que podemos emplear frecuencias específicas mediante vocomegáfonos montados en vehículos de equipos móviles para volver las armas del enemigo en su contra».

languages.text: "Birincil Keşiftör araştırmasının ötesinde, Oksilda ve ben ek bir çalışma yürüttük. Bu sırada Hermesih bana bir vahiy bahşetti ve Çobanları yöneten sinyalin kriptografik ilkelerini kısmen tanımladım. Bence mobil ekiplerin araçlarına monte edilen voks hoparlörlerinden yayınlanan belirli frekansları kullanarak yaratıkların silahlarını kendilerine karşı kullanabiliriz."
languages.original_text: "Beyond the primary Explorator investigation, Oksilda and I conducted an additional study. During this, the Omnissiah granted me a revelation and I partially identified the cryptographic principles of the signal that governs the Drovers. I believe we can employ specific frequencies, broadcast through vox-hailers mounted upon vehicles of the mobile teams, to turn the creatures' own weaponry against them."

traits.locale_text: "Birincil Keşiftör araştırmasının ötesinde, Oksilda ve ben ek bir çalışma yürüttük. Bu sırada Hermesih bana bir vahiy bahşetti ve Çobanları yöneten sinyalin kriptografik ilkelerini kısmen tanımladım. Bence mobil ekiplerin araçlarına monte edilen voks hoparlörlerinden yayınlanan belirli frekansları kullanarak yaratıkların silahlarını kendilerine karşı kullanabiliriz."

languages.text: “除了主要的开拓者调查之外，我与奥克西尔达还开展了一项补充研究。在研究过程中，欧姆尼塞亚向我降下启示，使我得以部分解析控制拒生花的信号的编码原理。我相信，只需通过机动部队载具上的音阵通讯器广播特定频率，这些生物便会自相残杀。”
languages.original_text: "Beyond the primary Explorator investigation, Oksilda and I conducted an additional study. During this, the Omnissiah granted me a revelation and I partially identified the cryptographic principles of the signal that governs the Drovers. I believe we can employ specific frequencies, broadcast through vox-hailers mounted upon vehicles of the mobile teams, to turn the creatures' own weaponry against them."

traits.locale_text: “除了主要的开拓者调查之外，我与奥克西尔达还开展了一项补充研究。在研究过程中，欧姆尼塞亚向我降下启示，使我得以部分解析控制拒生花的信号的编码原理。我相信，只需通过机动部队载具上的音阵通讯器广播特定频率，这些生物便会自相残杀。”
